title: ApiConstants — TIMEOUT doubled, MAX_IMAGE_UPLOAD_SIZE raised to 20 MB
commit_message: perf: increase upload limit to 20 MB and double network timeout for slow connections

why_tight_isolation.explanation: Only one source file changed. That file is referenced by 2 tests as sources (ApiConstants describe) and 5 more tests share the same suite file (api-navigation). Every other test category — standalone, cross-dependent — is untouched. This is the tightest possible selection: 7/77 tests, a single feature suite.
why_tight_isolation.key_point: No standalone test, no cross-dependent test is selected. Only feature/api-navigation.feature.test.js is affected.

CRITICAL.reason: describe() label 'ApiConstants' exactly matches both changed symbols' parent describe; sources[] = ['src/services/api/common/ApiConstants.js']

tests.test: ApiConstants > MAX_IMAGE_UPLOAD_SIZE equals 10 MB expressed in bytes
tests.result: ⚠️  WILL FAIL — value changed from 10485760 to 20971520; assertion toBe(10485760) fails

tests.test: ApiConstants > TIMEOUT equals 30 seconds expressed in milliseconds
tests.result: ⚠️  WILL FAIL — value changed from 30000 to 60000; assertion toBe(30000) fails

HIGH.reason: Same suite file (api-navigation.feature.test.js) — sibling describe blocks; conservative defensive inclusion

tests.test: endpoints.payment > addCard points to the correct payment creation path
tests.why: Same suite file; sources = ApiEndPoints.js (not changed) but the file has a CRITICAL hit

tests.test: endpoints.payment > getAllCards points to the cards listing path
endpoints.payment > paymentsCheckout points to the checkout path
endpoints.favourites > addCardtoFavourite endpoint points to sports favourites add path
endpoints.favourites > advertisement endpoint builder produces a correctly interpolated URL

coverage_gaps.reason: Test hardcodes 10485760 (10 MB). New value is 20971520 (20 MB). Update: expect(MAX_IMAGE_UPLOAD_SIZE).toBe(20971520)
Test hardcodes 30000. New value is 60000. Update: expect(TIMEOUT).toBe(60000)

selection_proof.key_point: Only ONE suite file is touched. This is the minimum non-zero selection possible.
